name: Mining and Solid Waste Reclamation Reserve Election

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers with mining or solid waste disposal properties subject to Federal or State reclamation requirements.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can elect to deduct current-year reclamation and closing costs by establishing a reserve, effectively accelerating deductions before the actual cash expenditure occurs.
